command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Restart Sakura to apply require_mention ==="
sudo systemctl restart hermes-gateway
sleep 12
echo "active: $(systemctl is-active hermes-gateway)"
echo "8080 listening: $(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -c 8080)"
echo ""
echo "=== Verify webhook still good after restart ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get('result',{}); print('webhook:', repr(d.get('url')), '| last_error:', repr(d.get('last_error_message')))"
echo ""
echo "=== Check log for clean start (no 429) ==="
tail -5 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
